dataset.name: Central Johannesburg TVET College Programmes for Chamu
dataset.purpose: AI-assisted TVET programme discovery and eligibility matching
dataset.important_warning: The source programme pages were published in 2022. They remain useful for structure and historic admission rules, but Chamu should verify current availability before presenting a programme as open for application.

NCV.starting_point: Grade 9 or equivalent usually enters Level 2
NCV.rule: Do not reject a Grade 9 learner because no Grade 12 APS exists.

NATED.starting_point: N4 usually requires Grade 12, relevant NC(V) Level 4 or equivalent NQF Level 4
NATED.national_diploma: N4-N6 plus prescribed relevant workplace experience may lead to eligibility for a National N Diploma.

creative_programmes.rule: Academic eligibility alone does not guarantee admission.

occupational_programmes.rule: Do not apply a university-style APS test unless the official programme explicitly requires one.

programmes.name: Art and Design

accepted_routes: National Introductory Certificate: N4 Art and Design
Equivalent NQF Level 4 occupational qualification
NSC or NC(V) Level 4 with calculated APS of at least 24

aps.calculation: Double English plus the next four best subjects

additional_requirements: Portfolio of Evidence containing pencil or oil-painting sketches

programmes.study_mode: Full-time unless the programme page states otherwise

funding.note: Funding depends on programme approval, household eligibility, available funding and current NSFAS/CJC rules.

manual_review_when: source details are marked for verification
creative portfolio or audition has not been assessed
learner applies directly to N5/N6 or NC(V) L3/L4 without prior results
programme availability may have changed

data_quality.warning: Programme pages are official but dated 2022. Confirm current intake, fees, campuses and continued offering before final application advice.

programmes.name: Mechanical Engineering

accepted_routes: Grade 12 or relevant NC(V) Level 4 normally required for N4
Previous N-level required for progression
additional_requirements: Mathematics and relevant science/engineering background recommended

elective_notes: Supervisory Management is part-time only at extra cost at N4.
Mechanical Drawing & Design and Supervisory Management are part-time electives at extra cost at N5-N6.
programmes.study_mode: Full-time unless the programme page states otherwise

funding.note: Funding depends on programme approval, household eligibility, available funding and current NSFAS/CJC rules.
